summary: P2 Features Testing Complete - Activity Logging System and AdvancedSearch Component. All 18 backend tests passed, frontend Activity Logs page fully functional with filtering, pagination, and sidebar navigation.

issues: Minor React hydration warning in console about <span> inside <tbody> and <tr> inside <span> - cosmetic issue, doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: AdvancedSearch component created but not yet integrated into any pages - available for future use as a reusable filter component
Activity logging is properly integrated into login, sales CRUD, expenses CRUD, and settings update operations
seed_data_creation: Created test sales and expenses during testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Activity Logs feature is fully functional. Summary shows stats for last 7 days. Filtering works by action type and resource. Pagination with 50 logs per page. Cleanup endpoint deletes old logs. AdvancedSearch component is available but not integrated into pages yet - it's a reusable component for future table filtering.

activity_logs_list_endpoint.details: Returns paginated logs with filters for action, resource, user_id, date range

activity_logs_summary_endpoint.details: Returns aggregated stats by action, resource, user, and recent logins for configurable period (default 7 days)

activity_logs_cleanup_endpoint.details: Deletes logs older than specified days_to_keep parameter

login_activity_logging.details: Login creates activity log with IP address, user agent, timestamp

sales_create_activity_logging.details: Creating a sale logs action='create', resource='sales', with amount details

sales_delete_activity_logging.details: Deleting a sale logs action='delete', resource='sales'

expenses_create_activity_logging.details: Creating an expense logs action='create', resource='expenses', with amount and category details

expenses_delete_activity_logging.details: Deleting an expense logs action='delete', resource='expenses'

settings_update_activity_logging.details: Updating company settings logs action='update', resource='settings'

activity_logs_page_ui.details: Page loads at /activity-logs with summary cards (Logins, Creates, Updates, Deletes for 7d), table with columns (Timestamp, User, Action, Resource, Details, IP Address), filter dropdowns, pagination, refresh and cleanup buttons

activity_logs_sidebar_navigation.details: Activity Logs link appears in Admin sidebar section for admin users

activity_logs_filter_by_action.details: Action filter dropdown with options: All, Login, Logout, Create, Update, Delete

activity_logs_filter_by_resource.details: Resource filter dropdown with options: All, Auth, Sales, Expenses, Customers, Suppliers, Stock, Users, Settings

advanced_search_component.details: AdvancedSearch.jsx component created with text search, select filters, range filters, date range filters - not yet integrated into pages, available for future use

authentication_required.details: All activity logs endpoints return 401/403 without authentication
